title: Soft Spanish Onion Pilaf with Sous-vide
description: A light and flavorful meal-prep dish featuring caramelized onions infused with umami notes and a low-carb-friendly sous-vide element.
instructions: Preheat sous-vide to 165°F (74°C). Place a large pot on medium-high heat with the vegetable oil. Sauté sliced onions until golden brown and softened.
Remove from heat, transfer to a bowl, then add soy sauce and let sit for at least 10 minutes to caramelize further and develop flavors.
In a separate pot or container in the sous-vide water bath, cook the low-sodium broth with sugar until thickened. Once ready, remove from heat and pour over caramelized onions.
Let cool slightly before dividing into meal-prep containers for use throughout the week.
